approximations.description: Browser launch/capture proves bounded entrypoint reachability and screenshot production, but not RPG Maker scene instrumentation or reference-runtime fidelity.

limitations: Chromium-compatible headless browser launch only; DOM instrumentation and branch control are not implemented in this adapter slice.
Screenshot bytes are ingested through the managed runtime artifact store and reported only by portable artifact URI.
RPG Maker MV/MZ support is limited to deployed browser-style entrypoints such as index.html or www/index.html.
Chromium browser launch is required for MV/MZ alpha runtime evidence; supported host environments must provide Chromium on PATH or through UTSUSHI_BROWSER_BIN.
Environmental misconfiguration (missing or incompatible Chromium, version below 100.0.0, unavailable display surface) is a hard error with semantic codes in the utsushi.browser.* namespace.
Adapter-discovered common install paths are a fallback after PATH lookup and are not guaranteed; operators with custom installs must set UTSUSHI_BROWSER_BIN.
Browser executable resolved through the adapter probe (source: configured, version: 149.0.7827).
Browser trace observes live post-render DOM (--dump-dom) text and choice events from the public MV/MZ fixture entrypoint; observation is empty when the render produced no instrumented DOM island.
Browser launch target was recorded as repository-relative fixture entrypoint index.html; raw local paths are omitted from report metadata.
Browser launch completed in 543 ms under the core bounded process harness.

Browser launch completed in 543 ms under the core bounded process harness.

payload.sceneName: The frost-veiled courtyard at winter dawn.

payload.speaker: Yuki
payload.text: The frost blossoms open at first light.

payload.speaker: Sora
payload.text: Then let us walk before the town wakes.

payload.label: The snow-walk route opens beyond the gate.

features.description: Launches browser-style runtime entrypoints through a bounded Chromium-compatible process. Required for MV/MZ alpha runtime evidence; a supported host environment must provide Chromium.
limitations: Chromium binary is mandatory: PATH lookup or UTSUSHI_BROWSER_BIN. Absence is a hard utsushi.browser.chromium_unavailable error.
Launch is headless and does not yet inject RPG Maker observation hooks.

features.description: Emits fixture-declared trace reachability after a bounded browser launch.
limitations: The adapter does not inspect DOM text or RPG Maker scene state yet.

features.description: Captures a headless browser screenshot and stores it through the runtime artifact store.
limitations: Chromium-compatible --screenshot behaviour is part of the required launch contract.

features.description: Reports the browser screenshot as frame capture evidence for smoke validation.
limitations: No pixel comparison or layout oracle is applied.

features.description: The browser adapter launches a runtime process rather than reading static-only fixture state.
Branch discovery requires RPG Maker runtime instrumentation hooks.
Jump-to-moment control requires RPG Maker runtime instrumentation hooks.
Snapshot save and restore are not implemented for browser launch smoke validation.
Playback recording is not implemented for browser launch smoke validation.
Emits browser launch observation hook envelopes for text reachability and screenshot frame evidence.
limitations: Hook events are produced by the launch adapter envelope and are not injected RPG Maker runtime callbacks.

features.description: The browser launch adapter does not inspect RPG Maker or JavaScript VM state.
Reference-runtime comparison is outside the browser launch adapter contract.

limitations: No raw local screenshot path is exposed in runtime evidence reports.
Chromium browser launch is required for MV/MZ alpha runtime evidence; supported host environments must provide Chromium on PATH or through UTSUSHI_BROWSER_BIN.
Environmental misconfiguration (missing/incompatible Chromium, unavailable display) is a hard error with semantic codes in the utsushi.browser.* namespace.

traceEvents.observedText: The frost blossoms open at first light.
Then let us walk before the town wakes.
